ww.title: Werewolf Online
ww.description: Play Werewolf online with friends. Create a room, get a secret role, and fight to survive!
ww.readYourRole: Read your role carefully — don't let others see!
ww.role.wolf.desc: You are a Wolf! Work with your pack to eliminate Villagers each night. Pretend to be innocent during the day.
ww.role.villager.desc: You are a Villager. Observe, discuss, and vote to eliminate the Wolves before they take over!
ww.phase.nightDesc: The wolves are meeting in secret...
ww.phase.voteDesc: Choose who to eliminate from the village
ww.win.wolvesDesc: The wolves have taken over the village!
ww.win.villagersDesc: All wolves have been eliminated. The village is safe!
ww.endGameHint: Closes the room for all players
ww.role.seer.desc: Each night, secretly investigate one player to learn if they are a wolf.
ww.role.seer.nightPrompt: Choose a player to investigate tonight
ww.role.witch.desc: You have one heal potion and one poison. Each can be used once per game.
ww.role.bodyguard.desc: Each night, protect one player from wolf attacks. Cannot protect the same person twice in a row.
ww.role.bodyguard.nightPrompt: Choose a player to protect tonight
ww.role.hunter.desc: When you are eliminated, you may shoot one player before dying.
ww.role.hunter.goal: Goal: Take a wolf down with you
ww.defend.title: Final Defense
ww.defend.subtitle: has {seconds}s to speak
ww.witch.title: Witch's Turn
ww.hunter.title: Hunter's Last Shot
ww.hunter.subtitle: {name} was eliminated — they get one last shot

home.tod.feature4: Play fully offline on one device

home.ww.feature2: Secret roles assigned to each player
home.ww.feature3: Night Phase: Wolves choose a target
home.ww.wolfDesc: Pretend to be innocent, gradually eliminate villagers each night
home.ww.villagerDesc: Find the Wolf through discussion and voting
home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.a1: Completely free. No account registration, no app installation required — play directly in the browser.
home.faq.q2: How many people are needed to play Werewolf?
home.faq.a2: Minimum 3 people, ideally 6–12 people. Each person uses their own phone or computer to receive a secret role.
home.faq.q3: Can Truth or Dare be played alone or does it need multiple people?
home.faq.a3: Need at least 2 people. Everyone sits together on one device, taking turns drawing cards and completing challenges.
home.faq.q4: Can I add my own questions to Truth or Dare?
home.faq.a4: Yes! Open the "Manage Questions" section in the game to add, edit or delete questions. Changes are automatically saved on your device.
home.faq.q5: How does Werewolf work across multiple devices?
home.faq.a5: The host creates a room and shares a 6-character code. Players enter the code to join on their own device. Roles are assigned secretly, each person only sees their own role.
